etymology.description: 初(初) (chū, "initial; beginning") + 恋(戀) (liàn, "romance; love") = initial stage of romance or first love
etymology.interpretation: 初戀(初戀) (chūliàn) signifies the beginning or first experience of romantic feelings, capturing the novelty and emotional intensity of a person's initial romantic relationship.

examples.chinese: 我的初恋是在高中时遇到的(我的初戀是在高中時遇到的)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ de chūliàn shì zài gāozhōng shí yùdào de.
examples.english: My first love was met during high school.

examples.chinese: 初恋的感觉是如此特别(初戀的感覺是如此特別)。
examples.pinyin: Chūliàn de gǎnjué shì rúcǐ tèbié.
examples.english: The feeling of first love is so special.

examples.chinese: 他常常回忆起他的初恋(他常常回憶起他的初戀)，因为那是他最快乐的时光(因為那是他最快樂的時光)。
examples.pinyin: Tā chángcháng huíyì qǐ tā de chūliàn, yīnwèi nà shì tā zuì kuàilè de shíguāng.
examples.english: He often reminisces about his first love because it was his happiest time.
